'''Buena Vista Records''', was the publisher of various book-and-record and book-and-tape sets and audio dramatizations, including many ''[[Star Wars]]'' film adaptations and other titles. The record label, headquartered in [[Wikipedia:Burbank, California|Burbank, California]], fell under the collective label of the [[Wikipedia:Disney Music Group|Disney Music Group]].

{{Company-stub|real}}

*''[[The Story of Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
*''[[The Story of Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]''
